summary: Iteration 161 testing complete: All 7 code-review fixes verified. Backend tests pass (8/8 for iteration159, 6/6 for iteration160). Frontend compiles successfully after node_modules reinstall.
critical_code_review_comments: Issue 1 (P0): Credential redaction VERIFIED - grep found 0 instances of djkingy79/Grubbygrub88/Cr1m1nalApp3al in /app/test_reports/*.json

Issue 2 (P0): auSpelling markdown safety VERIFIED - Node.js test confirms: preserves [text](/center-guide), https://example.com/center/page; corrects plain 'center' to 'centre', 'analyzing' to 'analysing'
Issue 3 (P0): iOS Quick Brief export VERIFIED - BarristerView.jsx lines 660-680 use isIOSDevice() check and window.location.assign(directUrl) for iOS

Issue 4 (P1): Reorder validation VERIFIED - PUT /api/cases/{case_id}/grounds/reorder returns 400 for duplicate ground_ids ('Duplicate ground_ids in payload'), 404 for nonexistent ('Ground not found: xxx')
Issue 5 (P1): Merged grounds error_identified/materiality VERIFIED - classify.py lines 269-282 concatenate all_errors and all_materiality from child issues
Issue 6 (P1): GroundsOfMerit UI jump fix VERIFIED - Line 303: displayGrounds = orderedGrounds (unconditional, not dependent on reorderMode)
Issue 7 (P2): Pytest URL guards VERIFIED - Both test files have pytestmark skipif for empty BASE_URL; test_iteration159 line 152-157 restores original ground order
